questionHtml:
Which term describes the whole of the genetic information of an organism?


A.  Genome

B.  DNA

C.  Gene pool

D.  Allele frequency

meta.title: Which term describes the whole of the genetic information of an organism? A. Genome B. DNA C. Gene pool D. Allele frequency
breadcrumbLabels: A3.1.8. Unity and diversity of genomes within species
